visual_description:
A man and a woman are shown in a close-up shot. The man, wearing glasses and an orange collared shirt, reclines on a white surface, possibly a bed. He holds a lit cigarette in his right hand and looks down at the woman with a slight smile. The woman, with long dark hair and wearing a leopard-print top, lies close to him, looking up at him and gesturing with her hands. The background is a dark, wood-paneled wall. In the top right corner, a watermark with Chinese characters, "风行网," is visible. The camera remains static, focusing on the intimate interaction between the two individuals. The audio is filled with a tense and suspenseful atmosphere. A low, ominous, and continuous musical score creates a feeling of unease and anticipation. The deep, resonant tones of the music build a sense of impending danger or a serious, dramatic moment.

The scene cuts to a very dark, nighttime setting. A single, bright light, likely from a vehicle's headlight, illuminates a patch of what appears to be grass or vegetation on the ground. The rest of the frame is almost completely black, creating a sense of isolation and mystery. The "风行网" watermark remains in the top right corner
